title: Team Championship

errors.loadFailed: Unable to load team championship standings.

warnings.missingMaster: The primary tournament is not configured.
warnings.tooManyRounds: A maximum of {max} rounds can be linked.
warnings.noMasterTeams: No official team is declared in the master tournament.
warnings.invalidMasterTeamCategory: Invalid category for team {team}: class={className}, division={division}.
warnings.unknownRoundCategory: Round {round} contains team event {event}, which is not declared in the master tournament categories. Expected categories: {expected}.
warnings.unknownRoundTeam: Round {round} contains team {team} in {category}, but it is not declared in the master tournament.

emptyState.noConfigDetail: Open the settings to link a master tournament and at least one round.
emptyState.noResultsDetail: No qualification data found for the configured rounds.

settings.title: League Settings
settings.masterTournamentHint: Pick from the list or type the tournament code.
settings.roundTournamentsHint: One code per line. Maximum {max} rounds.
settings.invalidJson: Invalid JSON. Please check the format.

standings.noTeams: No teams found for this category.

categorySettings.title: {category} point rules
categorySettings.detail: Configure how points are awarded for category {category}. Multiple modes can be enabled at the same time.
categorySettings.enableBracketPoints: Award points from final bracket ranking

intro: This module computes the standings of a championship held over several rounds. Start by configuring the championship: pick the master tournament and the rounds.
